name: On Pairwise Quantile Regression - Statistical Guarantees and Applications

description: arXiv:2607.04431v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Quantile regression provides a powerful tool for summarizing the conditional distribution of a real-valued random variable (r.v.) of interest $Y$ as a function of covariates $Z$ in cases where it shows a large dispersion with high probability, going beyond the situation where standard least square regression is informative/predictive.
